arts.sum: Mateo Retegui scored four goals last week as Atalanta easily defeated Verona 5-0 to move five points off Napoli ahead of this round. That gap could drop to three for at least a couple of hours if the...

arts.ttl: Preview: Atalanta BC vs. Cagliari - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Serie A clash between Atalanta BC and Cagliari, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
